creator: snb@threerings.net
text:
Updated MediaWiki packages have been available for awhile now, but  
the version numbers in this VuXML entry are still causing portaudit  
to complain that my packages are out of date when they are in fact  
not. All MediaWiki ports install with PORTNAME/PKGNAME of mediawiki,  
so I believe it is still necessary to make the changes specified in  
the patch I submitted with this PR (though with a current modified  
date, of course).
